Class AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T>>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the concrete builder type, enabling method chaining with the correct return type
All Implemented Interfaces:
VectorStore.Builder<T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AzureVectorStore.Builder, CassandraVectorStore.Builder, ChromaVectorStore.Builder, CoherenceVectorStore.Builder, CouchbaseSearchVectorStore.Builder, ElasticsearchVectorStore.Builder, GemFireVectorStore.Builder, MariaDBVectorStore.MariaDBBuilder, MilvusVectorStore.Builder, MongoDBAtlasVectorStore.Builder, Neo4jVectorStore.Builder, OpenSearchVectorStore.Builder, OracleVectorStore.Builder, PgVectorStore.PgVectorStoreBuilder, PineconeVectorStore.Builder, QdrantVectorStore.Builder, RedisVectorStore.Builder, S3VectorStore.Builder, SimpleVectorStore.SimpleVectorStoreBuilder, TypesenseVectorStore.Builder, WeaviateVectorStore.Builder
public abstract class AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T>> extends Object implements VectorStore.Builder<T>
Abstract base builder implementing common builder functionality for VectorStore. Provides default implementations for observation-related settings.

      protected T self()
      Returns this builder cast to the concrete builder type. Used internally to enable proper method chaining in subclasses.
      Returns:
      this builder cast to the concrete type

    • observationRegistry

      public T observationRegistry(io.micrometer.observation.ObservationRegistry observationRegistry)
      Description copied from interface: VectorStore.Builder
      Sets the registry for collecting observations and metrics. Defaults to ObservationRegistry.NOOP if not specified.
      Specified by:
      observationRegistry in interface VectorStore.Builder<T extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T>>
      Parameters:
      observationRegistry - the registry to use for observations
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • customObservationConvention

      public T customObservationConvention(@Nullable VectorStoreObservationConvention convention)
      Description copied from interface: VectorStore.Builder
      Sets a custom convention for creating observations. If not specified, DefaultVectorStoreObservationConvention will be used.
      Specified by:
      customObservationConvention in interface VectorStore.Builder<T extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T>>
      Parameters:
      convention - the custom observation convention to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance for method chaining

    • batchingStrategy

      public T batchingStrategy(BatchingStrategy batchingStrategy)
      Sets the batching strategy.
      Specified by:
      batchingStrategy in interface VectorStore.Builder<T extends AbstractVectorStoreBuilder<T>>
      Parameters:
      batchingStrategy - the strategy to use
      Returns:
      the builder instance
